green_fee_weekend_thb.note: All-in (green fee + caddie + cart). Valid through Oct 2026. Conflict: GolfSavers listed 4,300 THB — GolfBangkok figure accepted as more recent and explicit.

caddie_fee_thb.note: Included in weekend all-in rate. Weekday caddie fee separate — needs verification

cart_fee_thb.note: Included in weekend all-in rate. Weekday cart fee separate — needs verification

address.value: 15/3 Moo 2, Tha Phraya, Nakhon Chai Si, Nakhon Pathom 73120

prose.overview: Suwan Golf & Country Club is a well-regarded championship course located in Nakhon Chai Si district, Nakhon Pathom province, approximately one hour southwest of Bangkok. Opened in 2005 and designed by Weeyos Golf Design, the 7,145-yard, par-72 layout has earned international credibility by hosting the 2010 Asian Tour International and the 2011 Thailand Open — two of the most significant professional events held in Thailand during that period. The course is set among fruit orchards, rice fields, palm trees, and lotus ponds, giving it a rural, picturesque character that distinguishes it from the more urban Bangkok-area courses. For visitors seeking a championship-calibre course with a quieter, countryside feel, Suwan is a strong choice.
prose.layout_and_experience: The course plays to a full 7,145 yards from the championship tees, making it one of the longer layouts in the Bangkok area. The design makes use of the natural water features and vegetation of the Nakhon Pathom countryside, with lotus ponds, palms, and mature trees coming into play on multiple holes. The layout rewards accuracy off the tee — the wide, rural setting may look forgiving but the approach corridors are more demanding than they appear. The greens are well conditioned and true, and the overall pace of play is relaxed compared to the more congested Bangkok-central courses.
prose.tips: Allow at least one hour travel time from Bangkok, particularly during weekday mornings when traffic on the southern expressway can be heavy. The rural setting makes this a good choice for golfers who prefer a quieter, less commercial atmosphere. Caddies are included in the green fee. Confirm weekend rates directly with the club before booking as they were not publicly listed at the time of writing.
prose.location_and_access: Suwan Golf & Country Club is located approximately 45km southwest of central Bangkok in Nakhon Chai Si, Nakhon Pathom province. The drive takes around one hour by car heading south on Petchkasem Road, turning right at the Nakhon Chai Si junction. Grab is available for the route but confirm pickup availability from the club before booking.
prose.rental_cta_context: Heading to Suwan Golf & Country Club from Bangkok? Rent premium clubs delivered to your hotel — ready and waiting when you arrive.
